description: إصلاح خطأ SyntaxError في السطر 82 - دمج السطرين 82 و 83
command_preview:
import pathlib
p = pathlib.Path(r'C:\Users\Revexn\CodeAnalyzer\code_analyzer.py')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
lines = text.split('\n')
print(f'Before fix - Line 82: {repr(lines[81])}')
print(f'Before fix - Line 83: {repr(lines[82])}')
# Merge line 82 and 83: remove trailing newline from line 82 and prepend to line 83
new_line = lines[81].rstrip() + lines[82].lstrip()
lines[81] = new_line
del lines[82]
p.write_text('\n'.join(lines), encoding='utf-8')
print(f'After fix - New line 82: {repr(lines[81])}')
print('Fix applied successfully!')
